prestazioni: Engine swap to a D16Y8 (1.6L SOHC VTEC) from a 1996-2000 Honda Civic EX, paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, tuned via a Hondata K-Pro v4 ECU with a custom basemap targeting 22 psi of boost and 220 whp on 93 octane fuel

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Clutch Masters FX400 clutch kit with a billet flywheel, 4.9 final drive ratio from a Honda Integra LS (S80 transmission), and a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 40% lockup under load

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (part #9.5104G for front control arms), paired with Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar (part #BKR63X) to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny/Pandem van-specific fender flares (Part #RB-VAN-FF) paired with a custom 3-piece carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon, designed to fit the Partner Van’s unique bumper geometry

Full respray in Honda’s original ‘Cypress Green Pearl’ (NH-528P) with a matte clear coat by PPG, complemented by custom 17x8.5-inch Enkei PF05 wheels in ‘Gunmetal’ finish, wrapped in 215/40R17 Toyo R888R semi-slick tires for track use

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages (part #CC-HPV-01), featuring a Sparco Pro 2000 seat (part #01966NR) mounted on a custom slider base, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub
